entry.title: A Functional Taxonomy of World Models
entry.summary: Renderers, Simulators, Planners, and the Loop That Connects Them

entry.title: Streaming 3DGS worlds on the web
entry.summary: A technical deep dive into Spark 2.0's streamable, Level-of-Detail system for 3D Gaussian Splatting.

entry.title: 3D as code
entry.summary: Text became the universal interface for software; 3D is becoming the universal interface for space. It’s the medium that allows humans and AI systems to generate, edit, simulate, and share worlds together.

entry.title: World Labs Announces New Funding
entry.summary: An update on our vision for spatial intelligence in 2026.

entry.title: Announcing the World API
entry.summary: A public API for generating explorable 3D worlds from text, images, and video — bringing Marble's world modeling capabilities into your applications.

entry.title: Marble: A Multimodal World Model
entry.summary: Marble, our frontier multimodal world model, is available to everyone starting today

entry.title: RTFM: A Real-Time Frame Model
entry.summary: A research preview of RTFM, a new generative world model that generates video in real-time as you interact with it.

entry.title: Generating Bigger and Better Worlds
entry.summary: Announcing our latest breakthrough in 3D world generation with larger, more detailed environments and improved fidelity.

entry.title: Generating Worlds
entry.summary: Sharing our early progress toward persistent, navigable 3D worlds you can explore in your browser.
